"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\game_launcher.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\game_launcher.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\game_launcher.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\cc.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\game_launcher.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o game_launcher.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libgame_launcher.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\game_launcher.dir\linkLibs.rsp
